brief: Opportunity is overwhelmingly concentrated in Brooklyn city-owned parcels leveraging 485-x tax exemptions with Section 8 VPS rents to generate double-digit cash-on-cash returns. Out of 1,271 scanned lots, 918 pencil, with Brooklyn market-tier sites exhibiting significant headroom between estimated land costs and walk-away thresholds. Bronx parcels present supplemental program-tier plays driven by developer fees via ELLA / 4% LIHTC stacks.

targets.play: Deliver a 10-unit project in an R7-2 zone using a 485-x tax exemption and Section 8 VPS rents to achieve a 31.8% cash-on-cash return.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $569,141 provides $2,633,552 in headroom below the $3,202,693 walk-away land price.
targets.risk: City-owned site requiring HPD disposition process approval alongside site condition and zoning verification.

targets.play: Build 14 units under R7A zoning utilizing 485-x and Section 8 VPS rents to drive an 18.3% cash-on-cash yield.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $690,612 leaves $1,646,448 of headroom under the $2,337,060 walk-away threshold.
targets.risk: HPD disposition RFP process for city-owned land and site condition diligence.

targets.play: Construct 12 units on R7A land via 485-x and Section 8 VPS rents targeting a 16.9% cash-on-cash return.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $591,738 against a $1,850,943 walk-away land price yields $1,259,205 in headroom.
targets.risk: Requires navigating the city-owned HPD disposition pipeline and verifying zoning parameters.

targets.play: Execute a 10-unit all-affordable program build via an ELLA / 4% LIHTC stack to earn a $333,039 developer fee.
targets.negotiation: Tight land headroom with estimated land cost at $591,182 compared to a $57,379 walk-away land price.
targets.risk: High subsidy award competitiveness required alongside HPD disposition approval.

process_note: Initial screening estimates require full site diligence, zoning verification, and monitoring of HPD/EDC disposition RFPs rather than private acquisition.
disclaimer: AI interpretation of the engine's real screening output. Estimates pending diligence — not investment advice.
